scenario: Stellar Fintech runs a Camunda 8.8 SaaS cluster that handles 45000 transactions per hour for retail customers. The Spring Boot worker configuration still uses the legacy zeebe.client.cloud prefix for cluster identification and the platform team must adopt the documented replacement key listed in the 8.8 properties reference before the next deployment.
question: Which property listed in the Camunda 8.8 Spring Boot starter reference replaces the legacy zeebe.client.cloud.cluster-id key?

options.text: The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.cloud.cluster-id key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.cluster-id under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.
The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.cloud.cluster-id key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.cloud.cluster-id under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.
The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.cloud.cluster-id key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.zeebe.cluster-id under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.
The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.cloud.cluster-id key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.cloud.id under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.

a.text: Incorrect. The 8.8 reference keeps cloud-specific keys under a camunda.client.cloud branch; there is no flat camunda.client.cluster-id entry in the properties table.

b.text: Correct. The properties reference replaces the legacy zeebe.client.cloud.cluster-id key with camunda.client.cloud.cluster-id in the 8.8 Spring Boot starter, preserving the cloud namespace.

c.text: Incorrect. The replacement uses the cloud segment, not zeebe; camunda.client.zeebe.cluster-id is not listed in the 8.8 properties reference table.

d.text: Incorrect. The reference keeps the cluster-id name in the replacement key; camunda.client.cloud.id is not the documented entry in the 8.8 table.

explanation: Cloud-specific identifiers stay under camunda.client.cloud.* in the 8.8 Spring Boot starter; the documented replacement for zeebe.client.cloud.cluster-id is camunda.client.cloud.cluster-id.
